channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina Advances to World Cup Semifinals with Late Goal Against Switzerland
item.description: In a thrilling World Cup match, Argentina secured a 3-1 victory over Switzerland, advancing to the semifinals. Julian Alvarez's long-range strike in the 112th minute proved decisive, though the win wa...

item.title: Grade 10 Student Dies After School Fight Over Prayer Leadership
item.description: A Grade 10 student died after a physical altercation at Thika High School in Kiambu County. The incident began when two students clashed over who would lead evening prayers, escalating into a fight. M...

item.title: Federal Judge Dismisses Proud Boys Conspiracy Case Amid Trump Pardon Concerns
item.description: A federal judge has dismissed the seditious-conspiracy case against four top members of the Proud Boys, who led a violent mob into the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. In his ruling, Judge Timothy Kel...

item.title: Montreal Alouettes Defeat Calgary Stampeders 37-30 in CFL Match
item.description: The Montreal Alouettes secured a thrilling 37-30 victory over the Calgary Stampeders in a CFL matchup at Percival Molson Stadium, marking their seventh consecutive win against Calgary. Quarterback Dav...

item.title: Springboks Secure Narrow Victory Over Scotland in Nations Championship Match
item.description: The Springboks secured a hard-fought 42-28 victory over Scotland in a thrilling Nations Championship clash at Loftus Versfeld. The match, which saw both teams display high intensity, was closely conte...

item.title: Linda Noskova's Wimbledon victory after overcoming match-point heartbreak
item.description: Linda Noskova, a 21-year-old Czech tennis player, overcame a dramatic heartbreak in the Wimbledon final to secure her first Grand Slam title. After squandering five match points against fellow Czech K...

item.title: Zimbabwe's Constitutional Debate Over Mnangagwa's Term Extension
item.description: Zimbabwe is facing a significant constitutional debate as President Emmerson Mnangagwa's supporters push to extend presidential term limits, raising concerns about democratic governance. The proposal ...

item.title: Western Australia's Defence Manufacturing Focus Shapes Cabinet Reshuffle
item.description: Western Australia Premier Roger Cook has announced a cabinet reshuffle that prioritises the state's defence manufacturing ambitions. The changes, prompted by the resignation of Paul Papalia, see Cook ...

item.title: Nigeria's North: Political Rivalry and Regional Fragmentation
item.description: The article explores the evolving political landscape in Nigeria's North, where traditional power dynamics are being reshaped by diverse regional interests. It highlights how figures like Tinubu, Atik...

item.title: Argentina and Switzerland Clash in Thrilling World Cup Quarter-Final as Messi Leads Charge
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup quarter-final clash, Argentina faced Switzerland in Kansas City, with Lionel Messi at the heart of the action. The match saw a tense encounter marked by controversy, including ...

item.title: Man shot by police in south Wales after being believed to carry crossbow
item.description: A 21-year-old man from Newport, Wales, was shot by police following reports of threatening behaviour involving a crossbow. The incident occurred on Friday night at an address in St Edward Street, Newp...

item.title: Road Rage Incident in Lavington Sparks Investigation
item.description: A road rage incident in Lavington, Nairobi, has sparked widespread outrage after footage of a white Toyota Prado repeatedly ramming a smaller Suzuki taxi car circulated online. The incident, which occ...

item.title: US-Iran Escalation: Gulf States Targeted as Strait of Hormuz Closure Sparks Global Tensions
item.description: The US military has intensified strikes on Iran following Tehran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz and attacks on US facilities in Gulf states. Iran's Revolutionary Guards claimed they destroyed key U...

item.title: ED raid leads to breakthrough in international gold smuggling investigation
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) conducted a high-profile operation where a phone was discovered during a raid, providing critical clues to unravel a complex international gold smuggling network. The ...

item.title: Man Charged After Hit-and-Run Involving Multiple Vehicles and Officers
item.description: On July 3, 2026, a man named Jason MacLeod was involved in a multi-vehicle collision on Highway 3 near Liverpool, Nova Scotia. Driving a Chevrolet Silverado, MacLeod struck at least four vehicles with...

item.title: Argentina triumphs over Switzerland in FIFA World Cup match, eyes semi-final clash with England
item.description: In a hard-fought encounter at the Arrowhead Stadium, Argentina secured a 3-1 victory against 10-man Switzerland after extra time, setting up a highly anticipated FIFA World Cup semi-final showdown aga...

item.title: Bellingham's brace helps England reach World Cup semifinals
item.description: England advanced to the World Cup semifinals after a thrilling 2-1 victory over Norway, thanks to Jude Bellingham's two goals. The match, held in Miami, saw Norway take an early lead through Andreas S...

item.title: Canadian Museum's Nakba exhibit oversimplifies 1948 Arab-Israeli war history
item.description: The article critiques the Canadian Museum of Human Rights' 'Palestine Uprooted: Nakba Past and Present' exhibit for presenting the 1948 Arab-Israeli war as an unprovoked Israeli expulsion of Palestini...

item.title: San Diego Padres Tie Series with Toronto Blue Jays in Thrilling 8-7 Decision
item.description: The San Diego Padres secured a dramatic 8-7 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays on Saturday night, evening the three-game series. Ty France hit a go-ahead home run in the sixth inning, while Manny Mach...

item.title: Tribute to Jayden Adams: South African Football Mourns Loss of Promising Midfielder
item.description: Jayden Adams, a 25-year-old Bafana Bafana and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder, has passed away at the age of 25, leaving South African football in mourning. His death marks the end of a promising career ...
